metadata.title: MIDIMessageEvent Interface (MDN Reference)
metadata.summary: MDN reference for MIDIMessageEvent: the data Uint8Array payload and event timing.

description: The MIDIMessageEvent interface of the Web MIDI API represents the event passed to the midimessage event of the MIDIInput interface. A midimessage event is fired every time a MIDI message is sent from a device represented by a MIDIInput, for example when a MIDI keyboard key is pressed, a knob is tweaked, or a slider is moved.
availability: Limited availability This feature is not Baseline because it does not work in some of the most widely-used browsers.

constructor.name: MIDIMessageEvent
constructor.description: Creates a new MIDIMessageEvent object instance.

instance_properties.name: data
instance_properties.description: A Uint8Array containing the data bytes of a single MIDI message. See the MIDI specification for more information on its form.
